caption: A man with a tall, grey, sculpted hairstyle, glasses, and headphones is seated in a studio setting. He is wearing a white long-sleeved shirt with a red bow tie and tan suspenders. He is speaking into a black microphone on a stand, gesturing with his right hand as he talks. In the background, a person with bright pink hair wearing a green dress stands near a wall with the words "UNIQUE FASHION" and a framed picture of a face. A shield-shaped logo is also visible on the wall. The text "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" appears in red and white in the bottom left and right corners of the scene. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, and his right hand moves from a low gesture near his chest up toward his shoulder and then further upward and outward to emphasize his speech.
